name: multi_turn_image_audio_english
description: Two-turn English conversation with image+audio in turn 1 and audio-only follow-up in turn 2. Used to validate cross-phase consistency between Phase 1 (HF transformers), Phase 2 (vllm-omni), and Phase 3 (naia-os).

turns.description: Audio-only follow-up using context from turn 1

consistency._note: Phase 2 / Phase 3 results are compared against the Phase 1 baseline JSON saved at tests/cases/cross_phase/baselines/phase1.json. Tolerances are loose because TTS is non-deterministic across stack swaps; we are checking 'roughly the same response', not bit-equal.
